steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content:
Start with the given equation, then multiply both sides by $5j+8$. This moves the whole denominator out of the fraction without changing either side.
$$p=\frac{k}{5j+8}$$
$$p(5j+8)=k$$

steps.title: Isolate the expression
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $p$.
$$5j+8=\frac{k}{p}$$
The answer is A.
